description: Error handling in validateBlocks function could be more specific about which block is missing structure file
suggested_fix: Include the superblock name in the error message to help with debugging

description: parseCurriculumStructure reads all superblock structures upfront which could be memory intensive for large curricula
suggested_fix: Consider lazy loading or streaming the superblock structures

description: buildCurriculum function has high cyclomatic complexity with multiple nested loops and conditionals
suggested_fix: Break down into smaller, focused functions

description: File path concatenation without proper sanitization could lead to path traversal vulnerabilities
suggested_fix: Use path.resolve() consistently and validate paths

description: Inconsistent error handling patterns - some functions throw errors while others return undefined/null
suggested_fix: Standardize error handling approach across the codebase

description: SHOW_UPCOMING_CHANGES constant could expose development features in production if not properly controlled
suggested_fix: Ensure this is properly secured behind feature flags and environment checks

description: curriculumFilter is a global variable that could be modified unexpectedly
suggested_fix: Make it a constant or use proper encapsulation

description: Magic numbers used for challenge types instead of named constants
suggested_fix: Use an enum or named constants for better maintainability

description: Duplicate logic in viewTypes and submitTypes objects for similar challenge types
suggested_fix: Consider creating a shared configuration or using inheritance

description: superBlockStages object is very large and could be split into smaller, more manageable files
suggested_fix: Break down into separate files by stage or category

description: notAuditedSuperBlocks object has duplicated superblock lists across languages
suggested_fix: Create a shared base list and extend it per language

description: generateSuperBlockList creates new arrays repeatedly which could be optimized
suggested_fix: Cache the result or use memoization

description: File operations don't properly handle path normalization which could lead to path traversal
suggested_fix: Use path.resolve() and validate all paths

description: Missing error handling for file system operations that could fail
suggested_fix: Add try-catch blocks and proper error handling

description: applyFilters function has complex nested conditionals that could be simplified
suggested_fix: Break down into smaller, focused functions
